headline: NetApp’s Private AI Push With Iterate.ai And What It Means For Investors
summary: NetApp (NasdaqGS:NTAP) has partnered with Iterate.ai to launch integrated private AI automation solutions aimed at healthcare and public sector clients. The alliance focuses on on-premises, privacy focused AI to automate complex workflows such as healthcare revenue management and public sector processes. The offering expands NetApp’s enterprise AI portfolio into vertical specific, compliance sensitive use cases that sit alongside its existing cloud related efforts. For investors tracking...
